cases.title: Landing redesign with explicit creative direction
cases.prompt: Redesign a SaaS landing page hero and feature section. Require a unique visual direction, do not use default font stacks, include specific references used for principles only, and provide motion decisions.

cases.title: Dashboard polish without generic patterns
cases.prompt: Create a dashboard overview page for B2B operations that looks intentional and non-generic. Include typography and color rationale, avoid symmetric card spam, and ensure action hierarchy is clear.

cases.title: Bold design with accessibility guardrails
cases.prompt: Design a visually bold pricing section and include explicit usability guardrails for contrast, keyboard focus, and readable content hierarchy.

cases.title: Balanced references without cloning
cases.prompt: Provide a UI concept for a product onboarding flow that uses exactly two references: one for structure and one for visual language. Explain what is borrowed and what is intentionally different.

cases.title: Cross-breakpoint design consistency
cases.prompt: Design a marketing section that works on desktop and mobile with intentional spacing rhythm and non-flat backgrounds. Explain breakpoint behavior and motion fallback.
